name: ghormeh sabzi
instructions: saute lots of parsley, cilantro, scallions, kasoori methi in olive oil until very dark (30+ min). add yellow onions, garlic, turmeric, chicken (or skip for vegetarian). add red beans and water/stock, simmer 2+ hours. finish with lime juice.
notes: persian. inverts the herb-off-heat principle — herbs as bulk, cooked nearly black. lamb is traditional but we don't stock it. dried lime (limu omani) is traditional but lime juice is fine. white beans can sub for red.
